trans-unit.source: An account with this email already exists.
trans-unit.target: An account with this email already exists.

trans-unit.source: Password must be at least 8 characters with 1 uppercase letter and 1 number.
trans-unit.target: Password must be at least 8 characters with 1 uppercase letter and 1 number.

trans-unit.source: Failed to load users. Make sure you have admin access.
trans-unit.target: Failed to load users. Make sure you have admin access.

trans-unit.source: Failed to update role. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to update role. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: No tags created yet. Click "New Tag" to add one.
trans-unit.target: No tags created yet. Click "New Tag" to add one.

trans-unit.source: Type a query above to search the knowledge base
trans-unit.target: Type a query above to search the knowledge base

trans-unit.source: Found {VAR_PLURAL, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for "{VAR_QUERY}"
trans-unit.target: Found {VAR_PLURAL, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for "{VAR_QUERY}"

trans-unit.source: This article is only available in {VAR_LANG}.
trans-unit.target: This article is only available in {VAR_LANG}.

trans-unit.source: This may take a while for large knowledge bases
trans-unit.target: This may take a while for large knowledge bases

trans-unit.source: Ask me anything about IT issues
trans-unit.target: Ask me anything about IT issues

trans-unit.source: I couldn't find a resolution in the knowledge base.
trans-unit.target: I couldn't find a resolution in the knowledge base.

trans-unit.source: An agent will review your ticket shortly.
trans-unit.target: An agent will review your ticket shortly.

trans-unit.source: Review and manage AI-drafted knowledge base articles
trans-unit.target: Review and manage AI-drafted knowledge base articles

trans-unit.source: This ticket has not been claimed yet.
trans-unit.target: This ticket has not been claimed yet.

trans-unit.source: No tickets found matching your filters
trans-unit.target: No tickets found matching your filters

trans-unit.source: Is there anything else I can help you with?
trans-unit.target: Is there anything else I can help you with?

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: You do not have permission to perform this action.

trans-unit.source: Server error. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Server error. Please try again later.

trans-unit.source: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
trans-unit.target: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

trans-unit.source: Approve this draft? It will be published immediately.
trans-unit.target: Approve this draft? It will be published immediately.

trans-unit.source: Reject this draft? It will be archived.
trans-unit.target: Reject this draft? It will be archived.

trans-unit.source: Natural language queries with context-aware replies.
trans-unit.target: Natural language queries with context-aware replies.

trans-unit.source: Every resolution becomes a knowledge article.
trans-unit.target: Every resolution becomes a knowledge article.

trans-unit.source: Hybrid FTS + vector search finds answers instantly.
trans-unit.target: Hybrid FTS + vector search finds answers instantly.

trans-unit.source: AI-powered knowledge base that intercepts Level 0/1 tickets and eliminates the documentation burden on IT agents.
trans-unit.target: AI-powered knowledge base that intercepts Level 0/1 tickets and eliminates the documentation burden on IT agents.

trans-unit.source: Resolve issues before they reach the queue.
trans-unit.target: Resolve issues before they reach the queue.

trans-unit.source: © 2026 Shift-Left Knowledge Hub. All rights reserved.
trans-unit.target: © 2026 Shift-Left Knowledge Hub. All rights reserved.

trans-unit.source: Failed to create ticket. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to create ticket. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Failed to claim ticket. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to claim ticket. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Failed to add work note. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to add work note. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Failed to claim ticket. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to claim ticket. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Failed to resolve ticket. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Failed to resolve ticket. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: A key is currently stored. Enter a new key to replace it.
trans-unit.target: A key is currently stored. Enter a new key to replace it.

trans-unit.source: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Three simple steps to resolve IT issues before they reach your team
trans-unit.target: Three simple steps to resolve IT issues before they reach your team

trans-unit.source: User types their IT problem in natural language. Our AI instantly understands the context and searches for relevant solutions.
trans-unit.target: User types their IT problem in natural language. Our AI instantly understands the context and searches for relevant solutions.

trans-unit.source: The AI matches the issue against the knowledge base. If resolved, the user gets an answer instantly. If not, it's escalated to a human agent.
trans-unit.target: The AI matches the issue against the knowledge base. If resolved, the user gets an answer instantly. If not, it's escalated to a human agent.

trans-unit.source: Every resolution becomes a knowledge article. The system gets smarter over time, reducing future tickets and agent workload.
trans-unit.target: Every resolution becomes a knowledge article. The system gets smarter over time, reducing future tickets and agent workload.

trans-unit.source: Built for IT teams that want to shift left without the documentation burden
trans-unit.target: Built for IT teams that want to shift left without the documentation burden

trans-unit.source: Start resolving IT issues before they reach the queue. No documentation overhead. No setup complexity.
trans-unit.target: Start resolving IT issues before they reach the queue. No documentation overhead. No setup complexity.
